title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
takeaway: Wealth is what you don't see. The behavior gap costs more than the fee gap ever will.

title: The Intelligent Investor
author: Benjamin Graham
takeaway: Price is what you pay, value is what you get. Chapter 8 and 20 are the whole book: Mr. Market and margin of safety.

title: Chip War
author: Chris Miller
takeaway: Semiconductors are the new oil. Export controls, fabs, and lithography are geopolitics now — which is exactly why the hardware sleeve exists.

title: The Innovator's Dilemma
author: Clayton Christensen
takeaway: Great companies fail by doing everything right for their existing customers. Watch where the cheap, 'worse' technology is improving fastest.

title: Poor Charlie's Almanack
author: Charlie Munger
takeaway: Invert, always invert. A latticework of mental models beats a single lens.

title: The Price of Time
author: Edward Chancellor
takeaway: A history of interest rates — the backdrop for why the 10-year yield shows up on this site at all.

title: Energy and Civilization
author: Vaclav Smil
takeaway: Every economic era is an energy era first. Compute is no exception.
